hooks.command: bash -c 'CHANGED=$(git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | head -5); if [ -n "$CHANGED" ]; then COUNT=$(git diff --stat 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | grep -o "[0-9]* insertion" | grep -o "[0-9]*"); echo "{\"message\": \"Files changed: $CHANGED. Lines: ${COUNT:-0}. Consider committing with conventional format (feat/fix/docs/refactor).\"}" ; fi'
